---
title: "ISSS626 Geospatial Analytics & Applications"
listing:
  max-items: 9
  type: grid
  sort:
      "date desc"
---

Welcome to my Page!

This website is crafted as part of a module's requirement for the Master's programme (Visual Analytics & Application) under the esteemed guidance of A/Prof KAM Tin Seong.

![](geospatial.webp)
